ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parking_zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parking zone */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the parking zone */,
  "buildings" TEXT /* List of buildings associated with the parking zone */,
  "rate" TEXT /* Rate for parking in the zone */,
  "pay_when" TEXT /* Payment timing type (e.g., Pay and Display) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Accepted payment methods (e.g., Visa/MasterCard) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the parking zone */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the parking zone */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the parking zone */,
  "current_occupancy" INTEGER /* Current number of occupied spots */,
  "open_hours_start" TEXT /* Time when the parking zone opens */,
  "open_hours_end" TEXT /* Time when the parking zone closes */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the parking zone is currently active */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Last time the availability was checked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, faculty, visitor) */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the user's vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., car, motorcycle) */,
  "account_balance" REAL /* Current balance in the user's account */,
  "preferred_payment_method" TEXT /* User's preferred payment method */,
  "is_parked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is currently parked */,
  "parked_zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zone where the user is currently parked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_parked_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("parked_zone_id") REFERENCES parking_zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the transaction */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parking zone where the transaction occurred */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid for parking */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., entry, exit, top-up) */,
  "entry_time" TEXT /* Time when the user entered the parking zone */,
  "exit_time" TEXT /* Time when the user exited the parking zone */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the parking session */,
  "is_refunded" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transaction has been refunded */,
  "refund_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the refund (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES parking_zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  "is_enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment method is currently enabled */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Last time the payment method was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment history record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the payment */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction associated with the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "date_paid" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., entry, exit, top-up) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_history_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., parking expiration, new rate) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "read_time" TEXT /* Time when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parking_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for parking availability record */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parking zone */,
  "total_spots" INTEGER /* Total number of parking spots in the zone */,
  "available_spots" INTEGER /* Number of available spots in the zone */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the availability was last updated */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Last time the availability was checked */,
  "is_real_time" INTEGER /* Indicates if the availability is real-time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parking_availability_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES parking_zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parking_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parking rate record */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parking zone */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration for which the rate is applicable (e.g., 1 hour, 2 hours) */,
  "rate" REAL /* Rate for the specified duration */,
  "is_special_rate" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rate is a special rate (e.g., for events) */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Start date and time when the rate is valid */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* End date and time when the rate is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parking_rates_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES parking_zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., student, faculty, visitor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has administrative privileges */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the setting is currently active */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last time the setting was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "comment" TEXT /* User's comment regarding the parking system */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback has been resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
